  \"rationale\": \"Kick-out flashing is required at roof-wall terminations to direct water away from the wall assembly. Because the work is in progress and the flashing is missing, the correct sequence has been violated: the kick-out must be installed and integrated with the WRB before cladding, trim, or other finish work proceeds.\",
